usage_policy.description: These photos are FALLBACK assets only. They must NEVER override photos already uploaded via the admin dashboard (/admin/photos). Only use for items where image_url IS NULL in the menu_items table.
usage_policy.upload_priority: 1) Admin-uploaded originals (Supabase bucket), 2) Google Drive linked photos, 3) Platform-extracted photos, 4) Wikimedia CC photos, 5) AI-generated illustrations

notes.ai_generated_note: 13 AI-generated images are stylized food illustrations, not photographs. Recommend replacing with real photos via admin upload when available.
notes.wikimedia_note: 9 CC-licensed images from Wikimedia Commons. Some may be approximate matches. Verify and replace via admin if needed.
notes.platform_photos: 31 photos extracted from UberEats and DoorDash CDNs. These are the restaurant's own photos.
